<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.40.11-Bratislava">
  <identifier></identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language></language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title></title>
  <abstract></abstract>
  <contact>
    <name></name>
    <organization></organization>
    <position></position>
    <voice></voice>
    <fax></fax>
    <email></email>
    <role></role>
  </contact>
  <links/>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["unknown",BASEGEOGCRS["unknown",DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984",ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],ID["EPSG",6326]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8901]]],CONVERSION["unknown",METHOD["Azimuthal Equidistant",ID["EPSG",1125]],PARAMETER["Latitude of natural origin",35.498113,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8801]],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",139.677849,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["False easting",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["(E)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1,ID["EPSG",9001]]],AXIS["(N)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1,ID["EPSG",9001]]]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35.498113 +lon_0=139.677849 +x_0=0 +y_0=0 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>100001</srsid>
      <srid>0</srid>
      <authid>USER:100001</authid>
      <description>AEQD_local_studyhall</description>
      <projectionacronym></projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7030</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial minz="0" crs="USER:100001" maxy="-" maxz="0" miny="" dimensions="2" minx="" maxx="-"/>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start></start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
  </extent>
</qgis>
